recommendations.title: Strictly Ballroom
recommendations.overview: Brave new steps put Scott's career in jeopardy. With a new partner and determination, can he still succeed?

recommendations.title: Elvis
recommendations.overview: The life story of Elvis Presley as seen through the complicated relationship with his enigmatic manager, Colonel Tom Parker.

recommendations.title: The Great Gatsby

recommendations.title: Purple Hearts
recommendations.overview: An aspiring musician agrees to a marriage of convenience with a soon-to-deploy Marine, but a tragedy soon turns their fake relationship all too real.

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.
